# PERF-213 positive: package-level cache grows without bounds
lang: go
file: PERF-213-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

var renderCache = map[string]int{}

func Lookup(key string) int {
	if v, ok := renderCache[key]; ok {
		return v
	}
	renderCache[key] = len(key)
	return renderCache[key]
}
